title: angelica tomentosa var. californica
intro: Angelica tomentosa var. californica, also known as California angelica or California wild celery, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Angelica tomentosa var. californica include reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
